proposal1.heroHeadline: WRTR is losing $58,320 a year to inefficient proposal creation.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a proposal for WRTR's services takes hours. With our system, it takes 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Every moment costs WRTR money and opportunity.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: WRTR spends 3 hours per proposal. At 20 proposals a month, that’s 720 hours annually. With strategic time worth $75/hour, that’s $54,000 wasted annually.

problems.title: Revenue Slippage
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean delayed deals. A 2-day delay risks losing $12,000 monthly in potential revenue by missing client timelines.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Inconsistent proposal formats confuse clients. Each misalignment in branding risks a 10% trust reduction, impacting WRTR's reputation and potential $240,000/year in client retention.

problems.title: Competitive Disadvantage
problems.description: WRTR’s lengthy proposal process lags behind competitors. Every week lost gives rivals an edge, risking a 5% market share loss, equivalent to $120,000 annually.

problems.title: Missed Follow-ups
problems.description: Without timely follow-ups, WRTR misses closing deals. Each missed follow-up could lose up to $5,000 in potential sales monthly.

problems.title: Scaling Bottleneck
problems.description: Manual processes hinder WRTR’s growth. With a cap at 20 proposals monthly, potential $60,000 in additional revenue remains untapped.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system directly replaces these inefficiencies with seamless automation.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: WRTR currently takes 3 hours to create a proposal. Our system delivers the same in 47 seconds, slashing time by 99%.

solutions.title: 24/7 AI Chatbot
solutions.description: Missed follow-ups cost WRTR deals. Our chatbot handles objections and books meetings instantly, ensuring no leads slip through.

solutions.title: Behavioral Tracking
solutions.description: WRTR lacks insights on proposal engagement. Our system tracks scroll depth and time on section, providing actionable data to refine pitches.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Inconsistent proposals harm WRTR's image. Our system ensures uniformity, enhancing brand trust and client retention by 10%.

solutions.title: Scalable Solutions
solutions.description: WRTR’s growth is capped by manual limits. Our system enables scaling up to 100 proposals monthly without additional headcount.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for WRTR's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for WRTR around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for WRTR.

proposal2.tag: Proposal for Cascade Health Systems // Confidential
proposal2.heroHeadline: Drive 22% Patient Engagement Increase with WRTR's Precision Campaigns
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Our strategic campaigns will enhance patient engagement by 22% within 6 months, ensuring measurable improvements in your outreach and service utilization.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Cascade Health Systems is currently experiencing significant financial and operational losses.

problems.title: Lost Patient Engagement
problems.description: With a 15% drop in patient engagement, you are losing approximately $120,000 annually in potential revenue from repeat visits and referrals.

problems.title: High Cost Per Patient Acquisition
problems.description: Your current cost per patient acquisition is $340. Reducing this by 20% could save you $68,000 annually.

problems.title: Ineffective Digital Campaigns
problems.description: Over $50,000 is being spent annually on digital campaigns with less than a 1.5% conversion rate, resulting in wasted resources.

problems.title: Suboptimal Website Performance
problems.description: Your website's bounce rate is at 65%. This results in a $94,000 annual loss due to unconverted traffic.

problems.title: Missed Appointment Follow-ups
problems.description: An estimated 12% of appointments are missed due to lack of follow-ups, costing approximately $45,000 in potential earnings.

problems.title: Inefficient Patient Feedback Loop
problems.description: Without a streamlined feedback system, you face a 20% increase in patient dissatisfaction, potentially losing $30,000 in future patient value.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions directly address these quantified losses, ensuring a robust turnaround.

solutions.title: Patient Engagement Campaigns
solutions.description: This service will tackle lost patient engagement. We will develop targeted campaigns with personalized content and precision targeting. Expect a 22% engagement increase within 3 months.

solutions.title: Conversion-Focused Website Redesign
solutions.description: Addressing your website performance issue, we will redesign your site with a focus on conversion optimization and speed improvements. Deliverables include a new UX/UI and faster loading times.

solutions.title: Strategic Digital Advertising
solutions.description: We will refine your digital campaigns to improve conversion rates. By crafting more effective ad content and targeting, anticipate a 2.5x ROAS within 6 months.

solutions.title: Automated Follow-Up System
solutions.description: To reduce missed appointments, we will implement an automated follow-up system. Deliverables include SMS and email reminders integrated with your CRM.

metrics.label: Increase in patient engagement within 6 months.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Healthcare Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With over 15 healthcare clients served, our track record speaks for itself. We understand the nuances of your industry.

whyUsCards.title: Data-Driven Strategies
whyUsCards.description: Our approach is grounded in analytics and data insights. We use these to craft precise strategies that deliver measurable results.

whyUsCards.title: Personalized Service
whyUsCards.description: Our team works closely with yours, ensuring that every solution is tailored to your specific needs and goals.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Results
whyUsCards.description: Our campaigns consistently achieve above-average industry benchmarks, ensuring your investment generates real returns.

socialProof.label: Our dedicated team ensures personalized attention.
Healthcare organizations trust us with their marketing.

team.bio: Tom has over 20 years of experience in marketing, specializing in healthcare strategies. His leadership has driven WRTR's success with a focus on data-driven results.

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
process.description: We conduct a thorough analysis of your current marketing efforts and identify key areas for improvement.

lead.company_description:
We are hard-wired to drive predictable revenue for our clients by unlocking, automating, and augmenting their funnels, pipeline, and operations for a de-costed, de-risked path to maximum profitability at scale.
 
With over a decade of experience helping hundreds of businesses from start-ups to enterprises, spanning 4 continents and 20+ countries we know what it takes to unlock our client's growth potential. We know exactly what it takes to open doors for our clients by getting them in front of the right decision-makers, with the right message at the right time!


Our talent and team augmentation solutions are geared perfectly to complement the revenue growth that we unlock and bestow on our clients, ensuring a more seamless, profitable path as they scale. Augmentix by Team Rocket unlocks our clients and their internal teams from repetitive operational tasks, circumnavigating bottlenecks and overloads by plugging flexible, remote, global talent, experts in their fields.
